records.m_Talk_ENG: Countless <color=#ffd34c>Miracles</color> lie dormant in the Holy Curia's secret library.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Countless <color=#ffd34c>Miracles</color> lie dormant in the Holy Curia's secret library.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Countless <color=#ffd34c>Miracles</color> lie dormant in the Holy Curia's secret library.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are clues that the church had been collecting long before the existence of the Administration was revealed to the public.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are clues that the church had been collecting long before the existence of the Administration was revealed to the public.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are clues that the church had been collecting long before the existence of the Administration was revealed to the public.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For instance, there is a grimoire that can cure stomachaches just by reading its passages out loud.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For instance, there is a grimoire that can cure stomachaches just by reading its passages out loud.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For instance, there is a grimoire that can cure stomachaches just by reading its passages out loud.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or even the will of a martyr who died after being falsely accused and shedding pure white blood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or even the will of a martyr who died after being falsely accused and shedding pure white blood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or even the will of a martyr who died after being falsely accused and shedding pure white blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since the establishment of the Holy Curia, the Dicastery for the Causes of Saints has pursued the whereabouts of Miracles by any means possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since the establishment of the Holy Curia, the Dicastery for the Causes of Saints has pursued the whereabouts of Miracles by any means possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since the establishment of the Holy Curia, the Dicastery for the Causes of Saints has pursued the whereabouts of Miracles by any means possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Moreover, no Miracle is weighed greater or lesser than another...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Moreover, no Miracle is weighed greater or lesser than another...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Moreover, no Miracle is weighed greater or lesser than another...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Therefore, the librarian of the secret library has a duty to preserve the Miracle itself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Therefore, the librarian of the secret library has a duty to preserve the Miracle itself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Therefore, the librarian of the secret library has a duty to preserve the Miracle itself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At times, they may seem insignificant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At times, they may seem insignificant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At times, they may seem insignificant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At other times, they are embarrassing to the point one wishes to completely erase the Miracles from the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At other times, they are embarrassing to the point one wishes to completely erase the Miracles from the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At other times, they are embarrassing to the point one wishes to completely erase the Miracles from the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nevertheless, the duty given to the librarian by the Lord is to preserve, not destroy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nevertheless, the duty given to the librarian by the Lord is to preserve, not destroy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nevertheless, the duty given to the librarian by the Lord is to preserve, not destroy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And so...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And so...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And so...

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Additionally, testimonies confirmed that the cake was sentient and displayed a high level of intelligence.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Additionally, testimonies confirmed that the cake was sentient and displayed a high level of intelligence.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Additionally, testimonies confirmed that the cake was sentient and displayed a high level of intelligence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I offer a prayer of confession.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I offer a prayer of confession.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I offer a prayer of confession.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One young librarian finds herself in deep contemplation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One young librarian finds herself in deep contemplation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One young librarian finds herself in deep contemplation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She has in her hands a certain dessert <color=#ffd34c>recipe</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She has in her hands a certain dessert <color=#ffd34c>recipe</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She has in her hands a certain dessert <color=#ffd34c>recipe</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps this, too, could be a clue to a Miracle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps this, too, could be a clue to a Miracle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps this, too, could be a clue to a Miracle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why do You lead me into temptation...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why do You lead me into temptation...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why do You lead me into temptation...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: J-just why...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: J-just why...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: J-just why...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: WHY...?! Why must You make me dredge up this humiliating memory and write it down...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: WHY...?! Why must You make me dredge up this humiliating memory and write it down...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: WHY...?! Why must You make me dredge up this humiliating memory and write it down...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why must these embarrassing records be preserved forever in the secret library...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why must these embarrassing records be preserved forever in the secret library...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why must these embarrassing records be preserved forever in the secret library...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will she continue to preserve the Miracle with her collected reason and faith?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will she continue to preserve the Miracle with her collected reason and faith?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will she continue to preserve the Miracle with her collected reason and faith?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or will she deny the Miracle she has witnessed out of personal feelings and destroy it herself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or will she deny the Miracle she has witnessed out of personal feelings and destroy it herself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or will she deny the Miracle she has witnessed out of personal feelings and destroy it herself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If this were to happen, then I...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If this were to happen, then I...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If this were to happen, then I...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Kgh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kgh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kgh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must destroy... the report Sister Nelson wrote and the chocolate mousse cake recipe...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must destroy... the report Sister Nelson wrote and the chocolate mousse cake recipe...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must destroy... the report Sister Nelson wrote and the chocolate mousse cake recipe...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must do it... No, I must make it as if it never happened in the first place...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must do it... No, I must make it as if it never happened in the first place...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must do it... No, I must make it as if it never happened in the first place...

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That holy night, when the world was covered in pure white snow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That holy night, when the world was covered in pure white snow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That holy night, when the world was covered in pure white snow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Miracle that occurred on that holy night lies solely in the hands of this young librarian...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Miracle that occurred on that holy night lies solely in the hands of this young librarian...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Miracle that occurred on that holy night lies solely in the hands of this young librarian...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please forgive my being unscrupulous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please forgive my being unscrupulous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please forgive my being unscrupulous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm? You?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm? You?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmm? You?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that you, Specky? Where were you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that you, Specky? Where were you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that you, Specky? Where were you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How strange, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How strange, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How strange, Sister Looper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your priest evaluation has already ended. So, what brings you to my office?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your priest evaluation has already ended. So, what brings you to my office?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your priest evaluation has already ended. So, what brings you to my office?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, such a cheapskate. Can't I be here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, such a cheapskate. Can't I be here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, such a cheapskate. Can't I be here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't concentrate in my room.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't concentrate in my room.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't concentrate in my room.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Concentrate? What requires your focus other than watching blasphemous videos?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Concentrate? What requires your focus other than watching blasphemous videos?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Concentrate? What requires your focus other than watching blasphemous videos?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, stop bothering me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, stop bothering me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, stop bothering me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm doing something important right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm doing something important right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm doing something important right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Hey! Give it back!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Hey! Give it back!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Hey! Give it back!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were... solving mathematical problems. Divisions, I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were... solving mathematical problems. Divisions, I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were... solving mathematical problems. Divisions, I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, s-so what if I am?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, s-so what if I am?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, s-so what if I am?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am perplexed, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am perplexed, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am perplexed, Sister Looper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you would no longer be interested in mathematics once your evaluation was over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you would no longer be interested in mathematics once your evaluation was over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you would no longer be interested in mathematics once your evaluation was over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's none of your business.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's none of your business.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's none of your business.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't need your help anymore. I can handle this perfectly on my own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't need your help anymore. I can handle this perfectly on my own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't need your help anymore. I can handle this perfectly on my own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You got a perfect zero.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You got a perfect zero.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You got a perfect zero.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, I'm dumb! What are you going to do about it? It's not like you helped.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, I'm dumb! What are you going to do about it? It's not like you helped.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, I'm dumb! What are you going to do about it? It's not like you helped.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eh, forget it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eh, forget it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eh, forget it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as I thought... maybe I can't make the nice list...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as I thought... maybe I can't make the nice list...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as I thought... maybe I can't make the nice list...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nice list?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nice list?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nice list?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Santa Claus gives presents to children on the nice list, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Santa Claus gives presents to children on the nice list, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Santa Claus gives presents to children on the nice list, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't need Santa, or even a present, but... I made a promise with Santa Claudia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't need Santa, or even a present, but... I made a promise with Santa Claudia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't need Santa, or even a present, but... I made a promise with Santa Claudia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To hold next year's Christmas party together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To hold next year's Christmas party together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To hold next year's Christmas party together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I thought I'd be nicer next year.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I thought I'd be nicer next year.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I thought I'd be nicer next year.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha, you have matured, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha, you have matured, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha, you have matured, Sister Looper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am happy that you have finally become a respectable Sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am happy that you have finally become a respectable Sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am happy that you have finally become a respectable Sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it. Your compliments mean nothing to me, you know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it. Your compliments mean nothing to me, you know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it. Your compliments mean nothing to me, you know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go away if you're going to keep teasing me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go away if you're going to keep teasing me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go away if you're going to keep teasing me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. That paper...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. That paper...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. That paper...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why do you look disgusted all of a sudden?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why do you look disgusted all of a sudden?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why do you look disgusted all of a sudden?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister... where did you get those pieces of paper you are using?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister... where did you get those pieces of paper you are using?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister... where did you get those pieces of paper you are using?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Paper? Oh, these...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Paper? Oh, these...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Paper? Oh, these...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just saw a bunch of paper lying around on the desk, so I took them. Were they important?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just saw a bunch of paper lying around on the desk, so I took them. Were they important?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just saw a bunch of paper lying around on the desk, so I took them. Were they important?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha, ha ha ha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha, ha ha ha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha, ha ha ha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why are you laughing? You're starting to creep me out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why are you laughing? You're starting to creep me out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why are you laughing? You're starting to creep me out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Impressive, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Impressive, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Impressive, Sister Looper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I always thought you deliberately chose to do things that upset me. But it seems you can be <color=#ffd34c>cute</color> sometimes too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I always thought you deliberately chose to do things that upset me. But it seems you can be <color=#ffd34c>cute</color> sometimes too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I always thought you deliberately chose to do things that upset me. But it seems you can be <color=#ffd34c>cute</color> sometimes too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cute?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cute?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cute?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is also the will of the Lord not to turn away those who wish to learn.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is also the will of the Lord not to turn away those who wish to learn.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is also the will of the Lord not to turn away those who wish to learn.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Feel free to ask anything you are curious about. I will be happy to teach you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Feel free to ask anything you are curious about. I will be happy to teach you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Feel free to ask anything you are curious about. I will be happy to teach you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Now I kind of don't want to.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Now I kind of don't want to.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Now I kind of don't want to.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Where could Sister Looper be at this late hour?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Where could Sister Looper be at this late hour?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Where could Sister Looper be at this late hour?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's not in her dorms. If she's not at the Parish, did she go out alone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's not in her dorms. If she's not at the Parish, did she go out alone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's not in her dorms. If she's not at the Parish, did she go out alone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? Why are the lights still on in the office this late at night?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? Why are the lights still on in the office this late at night?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? Why are the lights still on in the office this late at night?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Next is a fair division problem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Next is a fair division problem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Next is a fair division problem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How can one cake be divided equally among five people by cutting only three times?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How can one cake be divided equally among five people by cutting only three times?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How can one cake be divided equally among five people by cutting only three times?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to make three cuts to share with five people?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to make three cuts to share with five people?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to make three cuts to share with five people?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's easy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's easy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's easy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Easy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Easy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Easy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I first cut the cake into four slices with two cuts...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I first cut the cake into four slices with two cuts...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I first cut the cake into four slices with two cuts...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I cut down one person, so there are four slices for four people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I cut down one person, so there are four slices for four people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I cut down one person, so there are four slices for four people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is incorrect. Such violence is unacceptable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is incorrect. Such violence is unacceptable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is incorrect. Such violence is unacceptable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? That's not it? Then what's the answer?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? That's not it? Then what's the answer?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? That's not it? Then what's the answer?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, listen carefully, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, listen carefully, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, listen carefully, Sister Looper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The origin of this division problem traces back to Abraham and Lot's conflict in the Book of Genesis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The origin of this division problem traces back to Abraham and Lot's conflict in the Book of Genesis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The origin of this division problem traces back to Abraham and Lot's conflict in the Book of Genesis.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Abraham and his cousin, Lot, were fighting over a narrow pasture
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Abraham and his cousin, Lot, were fighting over a narrow pasture
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Abraham and his cousin, Lot, were fighting over a narrow pasture
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, there she goes again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, there she goes again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, there she goes again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't care what the Bible says, so just tell me the answer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't care what the Bible says, so just tell me the answer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't care what the Bible says, so just tell me the answer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rest assured, this is all a necessary process.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rest assured, this is all a necessary process.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rest assured, this is all a necessary process.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Haha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Haha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Haha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't know the two of them would be so focused on learning this late in the night...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't know the two of them would be so focused on learning this late in the night...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't know the two of them would be so focused on learning this late in the night...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm so glad that they have gotten closer with each other.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm so glad that they have gotten closer with each other.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm so glad that they have gotten closer with each other.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? Come to think of it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? Come to think of it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? Come to think of it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You made a wish, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You made a wish, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You made a wish, didn't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You wished that tonight, the two Sisters would become closer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You wished that tonight, the two Sisters would become closer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You wished that tonight, the two Sisters would become closer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In order to make two people become closer, miracles must occur over and over again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In order to make two people become closer, miracles must occur over and over again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In order to make two people become closer, miracles must occur over and over again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see, Brother Chocolat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see, Brother Chocolat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see, Brother Chocolat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The true Christmas miracle was your gift of seeing those two become closer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The true Christmas miracle was your gift of seeing those two become closer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The true Christmas miracle was your gift of seeing those two become closer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, yes. This, too, must be a blessing from the merciful Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, yes. This, too, must be a blessing from the merciful Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, yes. This, too, must be a blessing from the merciful Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Lord. For allowing us to celebrate a wonderful Christmas this year.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Lord. For allowing us to celebrate a wonderful Christmas this year.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Lord. For allowing us to celebrate a wonderful Christmas this year.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And next year too...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And next year too...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And next year too...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope everyone has a Merry Christmas.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope everyone has a Merry Christmas.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope everyone has a Merry Christmas.

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: This report has been prepared to challenge the Dicastery for the Causes' evaluation of the Miracle.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: This report has been prepared to challenge the Dicastery for the Causes' evaluation of the Miracle.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: This report has been prepared to challenge the Dicastery for the Causes' evaluation of the Miracle.

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Furthermore, many of the witnesses reported experiencing memory loss. Hence, not a Miracle.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Furthermore, many of the witnesses reported experiencing memory loss. Hence, not a Miracle.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Furthermore, many of the witnesses reported experiencing memory loss. Hence, not a Miracle.

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Third, the attached document is the recipe for the cake that was instructed by Claudia Nelson.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Third, the attached document is the recipe for the cake that was instructed by Claudia Nelson.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Third, the attached document is the recipe for the cake that was instructed by Claudia Nelson.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Countless <color=#ffd34c>Miracles</color> lie dormant in the Holy Curia's secret library.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Countless <color=#ffd34c>Miracles</color> lie dormant in the Holy Curia's secret library.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Countless <color=#ffd34c>Miracles</color> lie dormant in the Holy Curia's secret library.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They are clues that the church had been collecting long before the existence of the Administration was revealed to the public.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They are clues that the church had been collecting long before the existence of the Administration was revealed to the public.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They are clues that the church had been collecting long before the existence of the Administration was revealed to the public.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For instance, there is a grimoire that can cure stomachaches just by reading its passages out loud.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For instance, there is a grimoire that can cure stomachaches just by reading its passages out loud.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For instance, there is a grimoire that can cure stomachaches just by reading its passages out loud.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or even the will of a martyr who died after being falsely accused and shedding pure white blood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or even the will of a martyr who died after being falsely accused and shedding pure white blood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or even the will of a martyr who died after being falsely accused and shedding pure white blood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since the establishment of the Holy Curia, the Dicastery for the Causes of Saints has pursued the whereabouts of Miracles by any means possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since the establishment of the Holy Curia, the Dicastery for the Causes of Saints has pursued the whereabouts of Miracles by any means possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since the establishment of the Holy Curia, the Dicastery for the Causes of Saints has pursued the whereabouts of Miracles by any means possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Moreover, no Miracle is weighed greater or lesser than another...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Moreover, no Miracle is weighed greater or lesser than another...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Moreover, no Miracle is weighed greater or lesser than another...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Therefore, the librarian of the secret library has a duty to preserve the Miracle itself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Therefore, the librarian of the secret library has a duty to preserve the Miracle itself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Therefore, the librarian of the secret library has a duty to preserve the Miracle itself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At times, they may seem insignificant.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At times, they may seem insignificant.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At times, they may seem insignificant.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At other times, they are embarrassing to the point one wishes to completely erase the Miracles from the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At other times, they are embarrassing to the point one wishes to completely erase the Miracles from the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At other times, they are embarrassing to the point one wishes to completely erase the Miracles from the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nevertheless, the duty given to the librarian by the Lord is to preserve, not destroy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nevertheless, the duty given to the librarian by the Lord is to preserve, not destroy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nevertheless, the duty given to the librarian by the Lord is to preserve, not destroy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And so...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And so...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And so...

root.m_SubTitle_ENG: Additionally, testimonies confirmed that the cake was sentient and displayed a high level of intelligence.
root.m_SubTitle_DEU: Additionally, testimonies confirmed that the cake was sentient and displayed a high level of intelligence.
root.m_SubTitle_FRA: Additionally, testimonies confirmed that the cake was sentient and displayed a high level of intelligence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I offer a prayer of confession.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I offer a prayer of confession.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I offer a prayer of confession.

root.m_Talk_ENG: One young librarian finds herself in deep contemplation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: One young librarian finds herself in deep contemplation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: One young librarian finds herself in deep contemplation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She has in her hands a certain dessert <color=#ffd34c>recipe</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She has in her hands a certain dessert <color=#ffd34c>recipe</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She has in her hands a certain dessert <color=#ffd34c>recipe</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps this, too, could be a clue to a Miracle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps this, too, could be a clue to a Miracle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps this, too, could be a clue to a Miracle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why do You lead me into temptation...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why do You lead me into temptation...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why do You lead me into temptation...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: J-just why...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: J-just why...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: J-just why...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: WHY...?! Why must You make me dredge up this humiliating memory and write it down...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: WHY...?! Why must You make me dredge up this humiliating memory and write it down...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: WHY...?! Why must You make me dredge up this humiliating memory and write it down...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why must these embarrassing records be preserved forever in the secret library...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why must these embarrassing records be preserved forever in the secret library...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why must these embarrassing records be preserved forever in the secret library...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Will she continue to preserve the Miracle with her collected reason and faith?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Will she continue to preserve the Miracle with her collected reason and faith?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Will she continue to preserve the Miracle with her collected reason and faith?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or will she deny the Miracle she has witnessed out of personal feelings and destroy it herself?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or will she deny the Miracle she has witnessed out of personal feelings and destroy it herself?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or will she deny the Miracle she has witnessed out of personal feelings and destroy it herself?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If this were to happen, then I...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If this were to happen, then I...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If this were to happen, then I...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Kgh!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kgh!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kgh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I must destroy... the report Sister Nelson wrote and the chocolate mousse cake recipe...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I must destroy... the report Sister Nelson wrote and the chocolate mousse cake recipe...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I must destroy... the report Sister Nelson wrote and the chocolate mousse cake recipe...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I must do it... No, I must make it as if it never happened in the first place...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I must do it... No, I must make it as if it never happened in the first place...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I must do it... No, I must make it as if it never happened in the first place...

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That holy night, when the world was covered in pure white snow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That holy night, when the world was covered in pure white snow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That holy night, when the world was covered in pure white snow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Miracle that occurred on that holy night lies solely in the hands of this young librarian...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Miracle that occurred on that holy night lies solely in the hands of this young librarian...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Miracle that occurred on that holy night lies solely in the hands of this young librarian...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please forgive my being unscrupulous.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please forgive my being unscrupulous.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please forgive my being unscrupulous.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm? You?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm? You?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmm? You?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that you, Specky? Where were you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that you, Specky? Where were you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that you, Specky? Where were you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How strange, Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How strange, Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How strange, Sister Looper.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your priest evaluation has already ended. So, what brings you to my office?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your priest evaluation has already ended. So, what brings you to my office?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your priest evaluation has already ended. So, what brings you to my office?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, such a cheapskate. Can't I be here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, such a cheapskate. Can't I be here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, such a cheapskate. Can't I be here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't concentrate in my room.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't concentrate in my room.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't concentrate in my room.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Concentrate? What requires your focus other than watching blasphemous videos?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Concentrate? What requires your focus other than watching blasphemous videos?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Concentrate? What requires your focus other than watching blasphemous videos?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, stop bothering me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, stop bothering me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, stop bothering me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm doing something important right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm doing something important right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm doing something important right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Hey! Give it back!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Hey! Give it back!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Hey! Give it back!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were... solving mathematical problems. Divisions, I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were... solving mathematical problems. Divisions, I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were... solving mathematical problems. Divisions, I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, s-so what if I am?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, s-so what if I am?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, s-so what if I am?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am perplexed, Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am perplexed, Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am perplexed, Sister Looper.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you would no longer be interested in mathematics once your evaluation was over.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you would no longer be interested in mathematics once your evaluation was over.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you would no longer be interested in mathematics once your evaluation was over.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's none of your business.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's none of your business.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's none of your business.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't need your help anymore. I can handle this perfectly on my own.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't need your help anymore. I can handle this perfectly on my own.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't need your help anymore. I can handle this perfectly on my own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You got a perfect zero.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You got a perfect zero.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You got a perfect zero.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, I'm dumb! What are you going to do about it? It's not like you helped.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, I'm dumb! What are you going to do about it? It's not like you helped.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, I'm dumb! What are you going to do about it? It's not like you helped.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eh, forget it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eh, forget it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eh, forget it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just as I thought... maybe I can't make the nice list...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just as I thought... maybe I can't make the nice list...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just as I thought... maybe I can't make the nice list...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nice list?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nice list?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nice list?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Santa Claus gives presents to children on the nice list, no?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Santa Claus gives presents to children on the nice list, no?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Santa Claus gives presents to children on the nice list, no?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't need Santa, or even a present, but... I made a promise with Santa Claudia.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't need Santa, or even a present, but... I made a promise with Santa Claudia.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't need Santa, or even a present, but... I made a promise with Santa Claudia.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To hold next year's Christmas party together.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To hold next year's Christmas party together.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To hold next year's Christmas party together.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, I thought I'd be nicer next year.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, I thought I'd be nicer next year.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, I thought I'd be nicer next year.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha, you have matured, Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha, you have matured, Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha, you have matured, Sister Looper.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am happy that you have finally become a respectable Sister.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am happy that you have finally become a respectable Sister.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am happy that you have finally become a respectable Sister.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it. Your compliments mean nothing to me, you know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it. Your compliments mean nothing to me, you know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it. Your compliments mean nothing to me, you know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Go away if you're going to keep teasing me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Go away if you're going to keep teasing me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Go away if you're going to keep teasing me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. That paper...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. That paper...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. That paper...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why do you look disgusted all of a sudden?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why do you look disgusted all of a sudden?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why do you look disgusted all of a sudden?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sister... where did you get those pieces of paper you are using?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sister... where did you get those pieces of paper you are using?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sister... where did you get those pieces of paper you are using?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Paper? Oh, these...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Paper? Oh, these...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Paper? Oh, these...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just saw a bunch of paper lying around on the desk, so I took them. Were they important?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just saw a bunch of paper lying around on the desk, so I took them. Were they important?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just saw a bunch of paper lying around on the desk, so I took them. Were they important?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha, ha ha ha...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha, ha ha ha...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha, ha ha ha...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why are you laughing? You're starting to creep me out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why are you laughing? You're starting to creep me out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why are you laughing? You're starting to creep me out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Impressive, Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Impressive, Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Impressive, Sister Looper.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I always thought you deliberately chose to do things that upset me. But it seems you can be <color=#ffd34c>cute</color> sometimes too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I always thought you deliberately chose to do things that upset me. But it seems you can be <color=#ffd34c>cute</color> sometimes too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I always thought you deliberately chose to do things that upset me. But it seems you can be <color=#ffd34c>cute</color> sometimes too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Cute?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Cute?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Cute?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is also the will of the Lord not to turn away those who wish to learn.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is also the will of the Lord not to turn away those who wish to learn.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is also the will of the Lord not to turn away those who wish to learn.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Feel free to ask anything you are curious about. I will be happy to teach you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Feel free to ask anything you are curious about. I will be happy to teach you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Feel free to ask anything you are curious about. I will be happy to teach you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Now I kind of don't want to.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Now I kind of don't want to.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Now I kind of don't want to.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Where could Sister Looper be at this late hour?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Where could Sister Looper be at this late hour?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Where could Sister Looper be at this late hour?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's not in her dorms. If she's not at the Parish, did she go out alone?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's not in her dorms. If she's not at the Parish, did she go out alone?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's not in her dorms. If she's not at the Parish, did she go out alone?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? Why are the lights still on in the office this late at night?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? Why are the lights still on in the office this late at night?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? Why are the lights still on in the office this late at night?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Next is a fair division problem.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Next is a fair division problem.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Next is a fair division problem.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How can one cake be divided equally among five people by cutting only three times?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How can one cake be divided equally among five people by cutting only three times?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How can one cake be divided equally among five people by cutting only three times?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I need to make three cuts to share with five people?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I need to make three cuts to share with five people?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I need to make three cuts to share with five people?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's easy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's easy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's easy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Easy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Easy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Easy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I first cut the cake into four slices with two cuts...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I first cut the cake into four slices with two cuts...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I first cut the cake into four slices with two cuts...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I cut down one person, so there are four slices for four people.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I cut down one person, so there are four slices for four people.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I cut down one person, so there are four slices for four people.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is incorrect. Such violence is unacceptable.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is incorrect. Such violence is unacceptable.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is incorrect. Such violence is unacceptable.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? That's not it? Then what's the answer?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? That's not it? Then what's the answer?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? That's not it? Then what's the answer?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, listen carefully, Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, listen carefully, Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, listen carefully, Sister Looper.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The origin of this division problem traces back to Abraham and Lot's conflict in the Book of Genesis.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The origin of this division problem traces back to Abraham and Lot's conflict in the Book of Genesis.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The origin of this division problem traces back to Abraham and Lot's conflict in the Book of Genesis.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Abraham and his cousin, Lot, were fighting over a narrow pasture
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Abraham and his cousin, Lot, were fighting over a narrow pasture
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Abraham and his cousin, Lot, were fighting over a narrow pasture
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, there she goes again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, there she goes again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, there she goes again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't care what the Bible says, so just tell me the answer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't care what the Bible says, so just tell me the answer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't care what the Bible says, so just tell me the answer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rest assured, this is all a necessary process.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rest assured, this is all a necessary process.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rest assured, this is all a necessary process.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Haha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Haha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Haha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't know the two of them would be so focused on learning this late in the night...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't know the two of them would be so focused on learning this late in the night...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't know the two of them would be so focused on learning this late in the night...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm so glad that they have gotten closer with each other.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm so glad that they have gotten closer with each other.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm so glad that they have gotten closer with each other.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? Come to think of it...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? Come to think of it...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? Come to think of it...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You made a wish, didn't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You made a wish, didn't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You made a wish, didn't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You wished that tonight, the two Sisters would become closer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You wished that tonight, the two Sisters would become closer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You wished that tonight, the two Sisters would become closer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In order to make two people become closer, miracles must occur over and over again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In order to make two people become closer, miracles must occur over and over again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In order to make two people become closer, miracles must occur over and over again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see, Brother Chocolat.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see, Brother Chocolat.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see, Brother Chocolat.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The true Christmas miracle was your gift of seeing those two become closer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The true Christmas miracle was your gift of seeing those two become closer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The true Christmas miracle was your gift of seeing those two become closer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, yes. This, too, must be a blessing from the merciful Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, yes. This, too, must be a blessing from the merciful Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, yes. This, too, must be a blessing from the merciful Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Lord. For allowing us to celebrate a wonderful Christmas this year.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Lord. For allowing us to celebrate a wonderful Christmas this year.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Lord. For allowing us to celebrate a wonderful Christmas this year.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And next year too...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And next year too...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And next year too...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hope everyone has a Merry Christmas.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hope everyone has a Merry Christmas.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hope everyone has a Merry Christmas.

root.m_SubTitle_ENG: This report has been prepared to challenge the Dicastery for the Causes' evaluation of the Miracle.
root.m_SubTitle_DEU: This report has been prepared to challenge the Dicastery for the Causes' evaluation of the Miracle.
root.m_SubTitle_FRA: This report has been prepared to challenge the Dicastery for the Causes' evaluation of the Miracle.

root.m_SubTitle_ENG: Furthermore, many of the witnesses reported experiencing memory loss. Hence, not a Miracle.
root.m_SubTitle_DEU: Furthermore, many of the witnesses reported experiencing memory loss. Hence, not a Miracle.
root.m_SubTitle_FRA: Furthermore, many of the witnesses reported experiencing memory loss. Hence, not a Miracle.

root.m_SubTitle_ENG: Third, the attached document is the recipe for the cake that was instructed by Claudia Nelson.
root.m_SubTitle_DEU: Third, the attached document is the recipe for the cake that was instructed by Claudia Nelson.
root.m_SubTitle_FRA: Third, the attached document is the recipe for the cake that was instructed by Claudia Nelson.
